---
title: "Welcome to IHerbSpec"
page-layout: full
image: images/NaturaSpec-IMG_4840.png
include-after-body:
  text: |
    <div style="text-align:center; padding-bottom:2em;">
      © 2026 IHerbSpec
    </div>
---

![](images/NaturaSpec-IMG_4840.png){fig-align="center" width="90%"}

<style>
  #title-block-header .title { 
    text-align: center; 
  }

  main#quarto-document-content { 
    font-size: 1.125rem; 
    line-height: 1.7; 
  }

  .quarto-figure figcaption { 
    text-align: center; 
  }
  
  .content-narrow {
    max-width: 70ch;
    margin-left: auto;
    margin-right: auto;
  }

  .explore-section {
    text-align: center;
    max-width: 1000px;
    margin: 2rem auto;
  }

  .explore-section h2 {
    margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
  }

  .explore-grid {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr);
    gap: 1rem;
  }

  .explore-card {
    display: block;
    border: 1px solid #ddd;
    border-radius: 18px;
    padding: 1.25rem;
    background: #fafafa;
    text-decoration: none;
    color: inherit;
    transition: transform 0.15s ease, box-shadow 0.15s ease, background 0.15s ease;
  }

  .explore-card:hover {
    background: #f3f3f3;
    text-decoration: none;
    transform: translateY(-2px);
    box-shadow: 0 4px 14px rgba(0,0,0,0.10);
  }

  .explore-card-title {
    display: block;
    font-weight: 700;
    margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
  }

  .explore-card-description {
    display: block;
    font-size: 0.95rem;
    line-height: 1.4;
  }

  @media (max-width: 900px) {
    .explore-grid {
      grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr);
    }
  }

  @media (max-width: 600px) {
    .explore-grid {
      grid-template-columns: 1fr;
    }
  }
</style>

---

::: {.columns .column-page-inset}
::: {.column width="35%"}
![](images/IHerbSpecLogo-white-bgb.png){width="260px"}
:::

::: {.column width="65%"}
<div class="content-narrow">

The International Herbarium Spectral Digitization Working Group (IHerbSpec) is a global consortium advancing the collection and application of reflectance spectra from herbarium specimens to support integrative plant biology and biodiversity science.

Through the development of shared standards, protocols, and data-management practices, we facilitate the harmonization of spectral datasets while fostering collaborative research that connects institutions, disciplines, and communities worldwide.

</div>
:::
:::


<div class="explore-section">

<h2>Explore</h2>

<div class="explore-grid">

<a class="explore-card" href="protocol.html">
  <span class="explore-card-title">Protocol</span>
  <span class="explore-card-description">Standards, workflows, metadata, and best practices for herbarium spectral measurements.</span>
</a>

<a class="explore-card" href="publications.html">
  <span class="explore-card-title">Publications</span>
  <span class="explore-card-description">Selected publications from IHerbSpec members on herbarium spectroscopy and spectral data applications.</span>
</a>

<a class="explore-card" href="people.html">
  <span class="explore-card-title">People</span>
  <span class="explore-card-description">A list of IHerbSpec members.</span>
</a>

<a class="explore-card" href="contact.html">
  <span class="explore-card-title">Contact</span>
  <span class="explore-card-description">Connect with the working group.</span>
</a>

</div>

</div>

---

![Participants in the inaugural IHerbSpec workshop, Harvard University Herbaria, May 2025.](images/IHerbSpec.jpeg){fig-align="center" width="90%"}
